result.reason: Unhandled exception likely caused by a race condition during application shutdown when `ConnectionWindow` tries to activate an already disposed sibling panel because the `FrmMain.Default.IsClosing` flag is set too late.
result.approach: Move `FrmMain.Default.IsClosing = true;` to occur earlier in `FrmMain_FormClosing` to properly signal application shutdown, preventing `ConnectionWindow` from attempting to activate disposed sibling panels.
